Choose Your Path

Application Developer

Build and deploy applications with ease

  • Service Catalog
  • Code Templates
  • CI/CD Pipelines
  • Development Tools

Platform Engineer

Manage infrastructure and platform services

  • Infrastructure as Code
  • Platform Services
  • Resource Management
  • Automation Tools

SRE / Operations

Ensure reliability and performance

  • Monitoring Dashboards
  • Incident Management
  • Performance Metrics
  • On-Call Schedule

Security Engineer

Manage security and compliance

  • Security Policies
  • Vulnerability Scans
  • Compliance Reports
  • Access Management

Product Owner

Oversee product development and delivery

  • Project Dashboards
  • Team Metrics
  • Release Planning
  • Stakeholder Reports

ServiceNow Admin

Configure and manage the platform

  • Platform Configuration
  • User Management
  • Integration Setup
  • System Health
